creator: jeff+freebsd@wagsky.com
text:
I've definitely been "caught" by the "jexec problem" myself and would welcome this change.

Perhaps an enhancement request as it requires some thought as to how to do it, but that a jail can't be made "safe" to FIB changes

    # jexec some_jail_with_default_fib_2 setfib 3 ping 10.0.3.1

is somewhat concerning. Being able to configure a jail so that one could "lock down" the FIB and its contents would be a welcome enhancement, one day.
